title: SendHub
description: This can help you to send to the lobby
body:
SendHub: Central Lobby Management for Minecraft Servers

SendHub is a robust and efficient plugin designed to enhance the player experience on Minecraft servers by ensuring seamless transitions between game servers and the central lobby. When individual game servers shut down or restart, SendHub automatically redirects players to the designated main lobby, maintaining server continuity and minimizing disruption.

Key Features:
- Automatic Redirection: When a game server stops or restarts, players are immediately sent to the main lobby, ensuring they are never left in limbo.
- Configurable Lobby Settings: Easily configure which server acts as the central lobby and customize redirection messages to keep players informed.
- Lightweight and Efficient: Built to handle high player volumes with minimal performance overhead.
- Compatibility: Designed to work with various server types and configurations, making it versatile for different server setups.
- User-Friendly: Simple installation and configuration process, perfect for server administrators of all experience levels.

Why Use SendHub?
Running a network of Minecraft servers can be complex, especially when managing multiple game modes and ensuring players have a smooth experience. SendHub simplifies this by providing a reliable fallback solution, making sure that players are always redirected to a safe and stable environment in the lobby whenever a server goes offline.
Installation and Configuration:
- Download and Install: Add the SendHub plugin to your server's plugins directory.
- Configuration: Edit the config.yml file to specify your main lobby server and customize messages.
- Deploy: Restart your server to apply the changes and start using SendHub.

Conclusion:
SendHub is the ideal solution for Minecraft server networks looking to maintain high uptime and seamless player experience. By automatically redirecting players to a central lobby, it helps keep your community engaged and happy, even during server maintenance or unexpected shutdowns.
